text: Also Patrick between us the food truck fund is at 6.8. Trip probably takes 3-5 months off the timeline. Any thoughts on whether I should defer or just eat it?

How do you handle client venue-change chase-ups without sounding needy? Barbara at Cascade Library is holding a July 31 date but I need to decide by end March because of a family thing.
Ask her plainly. She'll respect it. Say 'I need to protect this date but I have a family conflict I'm working through, can I get back to you by March 25'. Boom.
Meredith is right. Don't posture. Repeat clients want honesty.

Question. If I do the trip for 2 people 1440ish and take 200/mo off contributions for June through August, how many months does the buildout timeline slip.
